name: Error Tracking System — Agent Integration (Package B)
description: Wires the error tracking system into the remaining IES agents and workflows. Package B covers quinn, shep, harper, and knox agent files (shared conventions reference), the daily-review step-03 update-system workflow step (error count in System State section), and the quinn-weekly-review skill (full error analysis and System Health section).

files.description: Adds Shared Conventions reference to agents/conventions.md for error reporting protocol.
Adds Shared Conventions reference to agents/conventions.md for error reporting protocol.
Adds Shared Conventions reference to agents/conventions.md for error reporting protocol.
Adds Shared Conventions reference to agents/conventions.md for error reporting protocol.

Adds error tracking count step to YOUR TASK sequence: read error-log.json, count today's entries, include in System State section of review file. Also adds threshold pattern note to Handoffs section logic.

Adds System Improvement Review section (step 8): invokes Rigby error analysis logic — count corrections this week, identify patterns, summarize agent performance. Adds System Health section to report template including corrections count, severity breakdown, trend, recurring patterns table, and improvement proposals.

changelog: Quinn, Shep, Harper, and Knox updated with shared conventions reference for error reporting protocol
daily-review step-03 now pulls error tracking count from error-log.json and includes it in the System State section of the daily review file
daily-review step-03 adds threshold pattern detection note to Handoffs logic
quinn-weekly-review skill adds System Improvement Review step: count corrections, identify patterns, summarize agent performance
quinn-weekly-review report template adds System Health section: corrections count, severity, trend, recurring patterns table, improvement proposals ready for approval
